title: Wheatley Laboratories
body:
![Wheatley, Space Core And Mega Wheatley in space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47369a63fc72f01e2dc0c2dd54c80937bafbd497.png)

This Mod requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

# Features

## Wheatley
![Wheatley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bcaaf63b09c607d5731f33605ccc1560875227c.png)

"_I AM NOT A MORON_"

### HE DOES NOT STOP TALKING!
While in your inventory Wheatley can randomly say a lot of different lines

### LET THERE BE LIGHT!
Right Click Wheatley to open the Wheatley Menu, while in this menu you have the option
to press the "Light" button which will give you Night Vision

### GET INSULTED!
In the same menu as the light you can also choose the insult option

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

by default it doesnt do anything but if you turn on the gamerule
"DoWheatleyExplosion" he will explode (WARNING : THE EXPLOSION IS VERY POWERFUL
USE WITH CAUTION)

</details>

## Space Core
![Space Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4edd52735d4c2e3485ee305d3de78dc2a632158a.png)


"_Space Space Wanna go to Space_"

### HE DOES NOT STOP TALKING ABOUT SPACE!
SPACE WANNA GO TO SPACE

### THATS ABOUT IT
He doesnt do much

## Mega Wheatley
![Mega Wheatley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3a611d84082f6ff10b043b37875892dbd097849.png)

"Hello, This is the part where I kill you"

Crafting 4 Wheatleys and a Nether Star will make MEGA WHEATLEY

MEGA WHEATLEY will attack you and throw Wheatley Bombs at you, it currently does not drop anything but it probably will in a future update


# Recipes
![Wheatley Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/011da5c7737104c17c4bd8d33d898e29f82aecac.png)

![Space Core Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/644e344df2fb3cf8df2d906db4462cd5c2f762c3.png)

![Mega Wheatley Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aba88d4f14d3c4613aad9494b576c4fbad6d0f9.png)




**All Credits go to Valve for creating Portal 2**

**This mod is **NOT** endorsed by Valve**

**This Mod is currently only uploaded on Modrinth, if you found this mod on any other website it was put there without my permission and could potentially be dangerous**
